sinkhole._comment: Pi-hole-style domain blocking. Needs 'pip install dnslib', sudo (port 53), and your router DHCP DNS pointed at this machine. Blocked domains then return NXDOMAIN network-wide.

firewall._comment: macOS pf IP blocking. OFF by default. When true AND running as root, the dashboard can add/remove block rules inside a dedicated 'homescope' pf anchor (reversible via panic flush). pf only filters THIS Mac unless it is your gateway.

alerts._comment: Alert when a device exceeds this many bytes/sec (0 = off). Also alerts on new devices and queries to blocked domains.
